name: First Class Room
description: Experience comfort and tranquility in our First Class Room, designed with modern elegance and natural surroundings in mind. Floor-to-ceiling windows invite in abundant sunlight while offering breathtaking views of lush tropical greenery.
Each room features a spacious layout, premium bedding, and a private terrace, creating the perfect retreat for guests looking to relax and recharge in a peaceful, coastal setting.

name: Deluxe Room
description: Our Deluxe Room offers a unique blend of indoor comfort and outdoor living. Surrounded by vibrant plant life, this space allows guests to unwind in a serene, open-air environment while still enjoying modern amenities.
Whether you're enjoying a morning coffee or an evening breeze, the relaxed atmosphere and thoughtfully designed space make this room ideal for couples seeking a quiet, romantic getaway.

name: Suite Room
description: Indulge in the ultimate island experience in our Suite Room, where rustic charm meets elevated comfort. Featuring handcrafted interiors and a spacious layout, this suite offers a warm and inviting atmosphere just steps from the ocean.
Perfect for extended stays, the suite includes a private sitting area and luxurious bedding, allowing guests to fully immerse themselves in the relaxed rhythm of resort life.
